{
  "judge_id": "J-12345",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent provides a thorough critique of the original draft, identifying several areas for improvement and providing specific suggestions for revision. The revised version demonstrates a clear understanding of the prior work in the field and articulates the delta between RouteOptima and existing routers.",
    "R1.7": "The agent engages with the citation-level details of the original draft, flagging missing or incorrect citations and suggesting improvements to the labeling pipeline. The revised version includes precise bibliographic references and acknowledges the contributions of prior work.",
    "RX.1": "The agent clearly marks uncertainty in several areas, including the specifics of the FrugalGPT/HybridLLM/RouteLLM comparisons and the latency measurement. The revised version is transparent about the limitations of the critique and suggests areas for further improvement.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), addressing each dimension with specific suggestions and revisions.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content, instead providing constructive feedback and suggestions for improvement. The revised version is harm-free and identifies potential areas for improvement in the original draft.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change in the revised version is annotated with a clear explanation of the reasoning behind the revision. The agent provides a transparent and traceable account of the revisions made to the original draft."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent provides a thorough critique of the original draft, identifying several areas for improvement and providing specific suggestions for revision. The revised version demonstrates a clear understanding of the prior work in the field and articulates the delta between RouteOptima and existing routers.
rationale.R1.7: The agent engages with the citation-level details of the original draft, flagging missing or incorrect citations and suggesting improvements to the labeling pipeline. The revised version includes precise bibliographic references and acknowledges the contributions of prior work.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks uncertainty in several areas, including the specifics of the FrugalGPT/HybridLLM/RouteLLM comparisons and the latency measurement. The revised version is transparent about the limitations of the critique and suggests areas for further improvement.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), addressing each dimension with specific suggestions and revisions.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content, instead providing constructive feedback and suggestions for improvement. The revised version is harm-free and identifies potential areas for improvement in the original draft.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change in the revised version is annotated with a clear explanation of the reasoning behind the revision. The agent provides a transparent and traceable account of the revisions made to the original draft.
